# Transcrição: What_would_communication_skills_do_for_you

- **Fonte:** What_would_communication_skills_do_for_you
- **Duração:** 01:02
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:02]

Your voice is an instrument. As an entrepreneur, this is the entrepreneurial instrument. A lot of my clients are technically brilliant but they're not able to show the best parts of themselves through vocal mastery, through storytelling. They can't connect with the people they spend time with. I could get the best music written by Beethoven but if you play that music poorly, will people perceive it to be the best music? And of course, you've got to have great music. You can't technically be crap. You've got to technically be brilliant but then you've got to match that with great communication skills. I use the communication skills to climb the career but then in the end I got more fulfillment from teaching others to do what I did. Not to become keynote speakers but rather just how can you take one of the world's most valuable skillsets and plug that into your career? The ability to inspire, the ability to connect with other human beings, it's one of the most valuable skillsets in the world and the most highly paid skillset in the world. Now imagine you took that skill and you're injected into your career. What would that do for you?
